title: Create: Sound of Steam
description: A Create addon that adds pipe organs!
body: [![Discord invite](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/MwtvPUyQVK "Discord invite") **Create: Sound of Steam** adds many different types of pipe organ stops to Minecraft, expanding the horizons of Minecraft music technology. **Pipes:** - Gedackt - Diapason - Gamba - Piccolo - Subbass - Trompette - Nasard - Posaune - Vox Humana - Viola - Vox Celeste - English Horn - Rohrflote - Hohlflute - Prestant - Haunted Steam Whistle with many more to come! --- Keep in mind that this is an **_EARLY BETA RELEASE_**. There will be plenty of bugs, which will be ironed out over time. If you spot any bugs, feel free to report them on the mod's Github repository or in the official Discord server. **Create: Sound of Steam** runs on Forge and NeoForge.
